notes: Requested changes: expand the evidence packet to substantial or complete; attach product-specific provenance to approved indications, contraindications, storage, dosing, warnings, adverse effects, and monitoring fields as applicable; verify the latest DailyMed/FDA label; keep labeled replacement therapy separate from off-label, compounded, research, performance-enhancement, and optimization contexts; and complete human review of the prescription-hormone and safety-critical fields before any promotion.
